title: A Shaking World
description: The news of Dressrosa spreads as the balance of power begins to shift.
scene: On pages 3–7, King Riku, Fujitora, Dressrosa Citizens, Marines, Straw Hat Pirates deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Everyone Abuzz! What is the true meaning behind it all?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: A Marine HQ Admiral is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Prostrate on the ground!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The video den den den den den den den men mushi is broadcasting, too!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Please, FuJITORA... RAISE YOUR HEAD.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Do you wish for the world to see this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wait... could this be... this is the reason you didn't lay a hand on Doflamingo?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The truth is ever paramount! I left every last bit of the fighting...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It was my gamble.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: to them!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: with what face could a man of the very system that allowed him to run amok...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: attempt to point his finger at a shichibukai and talk of justice?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This country won its victory through the efforts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: of pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: warriors, and its citizens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Everyone, excellent work! Well done!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Anti- Doflamingo organiza-tion,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The small royal Riku army!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Captain! Thank you sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We've accomplished all our missions! And so I, today, hereby...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Dissolve this organ-ization!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: fulfufufufufu. Go to the palace; I'm sure King Riku will take you in.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Yes Sir!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Tank! The Marines still have to do their job.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: shelter the pirates and warriors that fought for us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: In the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Take those without home or lodgings as well... I'm sorry to ask so much of you, but please...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Of course! With pleasure, my king.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Red line

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: The Holy Land, Mariejois

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Right then... let's start with Doflamingo's supposed addiction from the throne and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: The false information surrounding that incident!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: So am I to believe that it was a direct order from people above all of you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Anyhowever you are

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Why, for the likes of bloody doflamingo,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Did this entire world have to get turned on its head!?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Marine HD fleet Admiral SAKAZUKi (AKAINU)

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: If some- thing like this were to ever happen again, I as fleet Admiral...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Would lose an unbelievable amount of face!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: For the love of all that is holy, won't you old farts stop this charade already!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Insolent words will not be tolerated, Sakazuki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: The value of your "face" is only slightly less than zero.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: You marines are but the outward face of the world government.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Supreme power of the world government GOROUSEI*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: So, long story short, they went straight over yer heads altogether, didn't they!? Got passed up, did ya, by the puppets of the tenryubito!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: The matter in question was entrusted entirely to Cipher Pol!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: CP, eh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Hold your tongue, Sakazuki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: And what of Kuzan?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: to hear that that enormous enormous power has joined hands with black- beard...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: That is truly a punch to the gut of the Marines' dignity...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: That fool's already left the navy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Where he goes and what he does is of no business of ours!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Fleet Admiral Sakazuki!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: A report has just come in...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Royal Shichibukai Donquixote Doflamingo and his family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Have been routed by Straw Hat and law's pirate alliance! Dressrossa is all but razed to the ground!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: What in the...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: This again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: that little brat has...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: There is yet one more troubling matter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: The video and information broadcast to Dressrossa's three weigh- boring countries

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: Spread from island to island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: Faster than greased lightning,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Lighting fires as it went.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: Extra!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: Extra!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: Countries across the new world

dialogue.speaker: Underworld Brokers
dialogue.text: Joker's been de- feated!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: Your high-ness...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: We no longer have any way to get access to weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: Dawn it... announce OUR SURRENDER...

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
